DEFENDANT FRANK REYES , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA LONG OVERDUE MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING; DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR TO GIVE COUNSEL AN OPPORTUNITY TO MEANINGFULLY MEET AND CONFER. THESE DISPUTES REGARD 412 DISCOVERY DEMANDS, BUT THE MEET-AND-CONFER WAS LIMITED TO ONE TERSE E-MAIL EXCHANGE. THE NEW MEET-AND-CONFER SHALL BE CONDUCTED IN PERSON AND TIMOTHY TRAVELSTEAD AND SAMER DANFOURA SHALL PARTICIPATE IN IT. AFTER FULL COMPLIANCE WITH THE COURT'S ORDER, THE PROTECTIVE ORDER MOTION MAY BE RE-SET (IF NECESSARY); JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Dec-09-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Hearing re: DEFENDANT FRANK REYES , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA LONG OVERDUE Motion For Protective Order

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' motion for protective order is ordered off calendar to give counsel an opportunity to meaningfully meet and confer. These disputes regard 412 discovery demands, but the meet-and-confer was limited to one terse e-mail exchange. The new meet-and-confer shall be conducted in person and Timothy Travelstead and Samer Danfoura shall participate in it. After full compliance with the court's order, the protective order motion may be re-set (if necessary).

Judge Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Nov-22-2024 Continued To Dec-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
